title: antennaria alpina subsp. canescens
intro: Antennaria alpina subsp. canescens, also known as woolly cat's ear, is a subspecies of the Antennaria alpina plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is a perennial herb native to high-altitude mountainous regions, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and roots contain anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, offering health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Antennaria alpina subsp. canescens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
